message:
fix: add missing CGSE instrumentation to directed BFS/DFS variants

The directed variants of bfs_edges and dfs_edges were missing CGSE
(Canonical Graph Semantics Engine) instrumentation while their
undirected counterparts had it. This breaks witness collection symmetry.

Added CGSE instrumentation to:
- dfs_edges_directed
- bfs_edges_directed
- bfs_edges_directed_reverse

All three now properly record tie-break decisions and publish
complexity witnesses when collection is enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
